description: A retail chain places a large purchase order for multiple products to stock its stores for the upcoming season.

nodes.task_description: Receive the purchase order from the retailer and enter it into the order management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new sales order with all items and quantities from the retailer's PO.

nodes.task_description: Check inventory levels for all items on the order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that all items are in stock and can be fulfilled completely.

nodes.task_description: Send an order confirmation to the retailer with an estimated shipping date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a formal confirmation email to the customer.
